channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: devenjarvis/lathe
item.description: Generate hands-on, multi-part technical tutorials on demand, with LLM skills tuned to make content approachable. Then you work through them yourself, by hand ✋

item.title: yukiyokotani/office-open-xml-viewer
item.description: (no description)

item.title: NoopApp/noop
item.description: Offline WHOOP companion — pair your strap over Bluetooth, keep all data on your own device. No cloud, no account, no subscription.

item.title: amElnagdy/guard-skills
item.description: Guard skills for coding agents, quality gates that catch AI-generated failure modes in code, tests, and docs

item.title: itsyebekhe/nahan
item.description: A secure, lightweight, and customizable network gateway designed to run entirely on Cloudflare Workers

item.title: JimLiu/baoyu-design
item.description: Run Claude Design locally as an Agent Skill — Cursor, Claude Code & more. Produce polished UI mockups, prototypes, decks & wireframes as self-contained HTML, without claude.ai/design. Best with Opus 4.8.

item.title: AprilNEA/OpenLogi
item.description: ⚡️A native, local-first alternative to Logitech Options+, written in Rust 🦀 — remap buttons, DPI, and SmartShift over HID++. No account, no telemetry.

item.title: pat-jj/harness-1
item.description: 🚀 Ultra Recipe for Training Long-Horizon Search Agents - matching frontier AI's search capability with a 20B model

item.title: tripplyons/pokeemerald-wasm
item.description: Pokemon Emerald in WebAssembly

item.title: mysk-research/loupe
item.description: A privacy-focused iOS app that raises awareness about what native apps can see

item.title: FerroxLabs/wayland
item.description: Wayland - The AI Agent That Perceives. Reasons. Acts. Evolves.

item.title: rednote-hilab/dots.tts
item.description: (no description)

item.title: alibaba/open-code-review
item.description: Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.

item.title: robzilla1738/supergoal
item.description: Plan and autonomously build a software task end-to-end. One ready-to-paste /goal, adaptive phase count, memory preload + writeback, 3-strike self-healing recovery. Works on Claude Code and Codex.

item.title: microsoft/pg_durable
item.description: PostgreSQL in-database durable execution

item.title: muxuuu/serenity-skill
item.description: Serenity-inspired Agent Skill for supply-chain bottleneck stock research

item.title: mutonby/shortcast
item.description: Native macOS app: drop a long video → auto-cut viral shorts, captioned for TikTok/Reels/YouTube, reframed to vertical, and scheduled. 100% on-device (Gemma 4 12B + WhisperKit + MLX).

item.title: tastyeffectco/sandboxes
item.description: Self-hosted dev sandboxes with preview URLs. One command. No Kubernetes, perfect for coding agents and Saas factories

item.title: nexu-io/html-video
item.description: HTML→Video meta-layer for coding agents

item.title: anthropics/defending-code-reference-harness
item.description: Skills for threat modeling, scanning, triage, patching, plus an autonomous scanning harness you can /customize

item.title: MadsLorentzen/ai-job-search
item.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.

item.title: google-gemma/gemma-skills
item.description: Skills for the Gemma and model/agent interactions

item.title: MisoLabsAI/MisoTTS
item.description: Miso TTS is an 8 billion, highly emotive text-to-speech model

item.title: unicity-astrid/sdk-js
item.description: JavaScript / TypeScript SDK for building Astrid OS capsules. Companion to unicity-astrid/sdk-rust.

item.title: ideogram-oss/ideogram4
item.description: Ideogram 4: Open image model at the forefront of design

item.title: unicity-astrid/rfcs
item.description: RFCs for the Astrid agent runtime

item.title: cpaczek/skylight
item.description: Project the aircraft passing overhead onto your ceiling in real time, from an RTL-SDR — with a live sky layer (sun, moon, stars, ISS) and where each plane is headed.

item.title: VoltiusApp/voltius
item.description: A lightning-fast, modern, local-first SSH/SFTP/Serial client. Real-time E2EE sync, Team vaults, live sharing, plugins and more. Open-source Termius alternative for Windows, Linux, macOS & Android. Built with Rust/Tauri.

item.title: microsoft/SkillOpt
item.description: SkillOpt is a text-space optimizer that trains reusable natural-language skills for frozen LLM agents through trajectory-driven edits, validation-gated updates, and deployable best_skill.md artifacts.

item.title: unicity-astrid/sdk-rust
item.description: Rust SDK for building Astrid capsules

item.title: butterbase-ai/butterbase
item.description: Open-source backend-as-a-service. Postgres, auth, storage, functions, AI gateway, MCP.

item.title: microsoft/coreutils
item.description: Coreutils for Windows: Installer & Packaging

item.title: b-nnett/goose
item.description: Goose Swift proof-of-concept README

item.title: anomalyco/rift
item.description: (no description)

item.title: johnbean393/KeyType
item.description: An open-source Cotypist with macOS system wide AI autocomplete

item.title: boona13/image-extender
item.description: Seamlessly extend any image in any direction with AI. Open-source web app powered by Gemini via OpenRouter, with Poisson-blended seams and best-of-3 variant picker.

item.title: viggy28/streambed
item.description: Stream Postgres to Apache Iceberg on S3 via logical replication, queryable over the Postgres wire protocol.

item.title: Hawzen/I-found-a-seashell-in-the-middle-of-the-desert
item.description: (no description)

item.title: pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus
item.description: Self-hosted AI workspace.

item.title: boundless-large-model/boundless-world-model
item.description: High-fidelity world models for general embodied intelligence, such as data engines and world simulators.

item.title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
item.description: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

item.title: DannyMac180/skills
item.description: AI agent skills created by me: Dan McAteer

item.title: jmaczan/tiny-vllm
item.description: Build your own high performance LLM inference engine in C++ and CUDA - a smaller version of vLLM

item.title: jdevalk/specification.website
item.description: Website specification — HTML, accessibility, security, SEO, agent-readiness. Platform-agnostic, sourced, MIT.

item.title: msitarzewski/brew-browser
item.description: Homebrew is the standard package manager on macOS. brew-browser gives it a real native GUI.
